UAVariable.Description: Collects the data type descriptions of http://opcfoundation.org/UA/WMTP/
Indicates that all of the DataType definitions represented by the DataTypeDictionaryType are available through a DataTypeDefinition Attribute.
Collects the data type descriptions of http://opcfoundation.org/UA/WMTP/
Indicates that all of the DataType definitions represented by the DataTypeDictionaryType are available through a DataTypeDefinition Attribute.
Indicates if a limit has been reached.

uax:DisplayName.uax:Text: arithmetic mean since the beginning of the work cycle
root mean square (RMS) value since the beginning of the work cycle
maximum value in the current work cycle
minimum value in the current work cycle

UAObjectType.Category: WMTP Service and LifeCycle Information Basic
WMTP Service and LifeCycle Information Advanced

UAVariable.Description: The process value.
A human-readable, localized name of the manufacturer of the MachineryItem.

A string containing a unique production number of the manufacturer of the MachineryItem. The global uniqueness of the serial number is only given in the context of the manufacturer, and potentially the model. The value shall not change during the life-cycle of the MachineryItem.
LimitValue indicates when the end of lifetime has been reached.
StartValue indicates the initial value, when there is still the full lifetime left.
LimitValue indicates when the end of lifetime has been reached.
StartValue indicates the initial value, when there is still the full lifetime left.
LimitValue indicates when the end of lifetime has been reached.
StartValue indicates the initial value, when there is still the full lifetime left.
LimitValue indicates when the end of lifetime has been reached.
StartValue indicates the initial value, when there is still the full lifetime left.
LimitValue indicates when the end of lifetime has been reached.
StartValue indicates the initial value, when there is still the full lifetime left.
The process value.

root mean square (RMS) value since the beginning of the work cycle
maximum value in the current work cycle
minimum value in the current work cycle
